projectDescription: A modern, feature-rich Minecraft server plugin suite for Spigot and Paper that provides essential commands, economy, chat formatting, Discord integration, and more.
keyFeatures: 100+ essential server commands (teleport, home, warp, kit, economy, moderation, etc.)
Vault-integrated economy system with balance, pay, and sign shops
EssentialsX Chat module for custom chat formatting with prefixes/suffixes
EssentialsX Discord module for bidirectional Minecraft-Discord bridge
EssentialsX Spawn for fine-grained spawn/respawn control
EssentialsX Protect for block and physics protection
EssentialsX GeoIP for geolocation-based player info
EssentialsX DiscordLink for linking Minecraft accounts to Discord
Extensive permission system with hundreds of granular permission nodes
Developer API for economy, teleport, events, and Discord integration
Multi-language support with 50+ community translations via Crowdin
Supports Minecraft 1.8.8 through the latest versions
publicApiSurface: net.ess3.api.IUser — player data and state access
com.earth2me.essentials.api.Economy — economy operations (getMoneyExact, setMoney, add, subtract)
net.essentialsx.api.v2.services.discord.DiscordService — send messages and register slash commands
net.essentialsx.api.v2.services.discord.InteractionCommand — base class for Discord slash commands
net.ess3.api.events.AfkStatusChangeEvent — triggered on AFK state change
